title: netbox-services plugin
description: Native NetBox SoT for application install-data + service integrations (catalog, instances, edges, HA) — DESIGN.md Phase B.

phases.title: Plugin models + plumbing
phases.exit_criteria: All models have REST API + filtersets + forms + tables + navigation + views + hand-authored migration + no-mock tests; makemigrations --check clean; test suite green.

items.description: ServiceCatalog(+CatalogCredential/Token/SecondaryPort/IntegrationCatalog/TestState/TestIntegration), ServiceInstance(+InstanceOpenBaoPath), Integration, HAMirror with cardinality validation.

items.feature: Per-edge integration config params as SoT
items.description: IntegrationCatalogParam (catalog-level typed schema: key/value_type/required/default/secret) + IntegrationParam (instance-level store-on-override value on one Integration edge). Moves the per-edge params from inline integrate_*.yml (SSO redirect URIs/scopes/claims, cache db-index, S3 bucket/prefix, SMTP from-address) into NetBox. clean() validates declared-key, value_type parse, required-completeness, and the secret_ref/OpenBao-path boundary (no inline secret values). Mirrors the catalog-declares/instance-values split used for tokens & ports. Migration 0002_integration_params.
